comment: Sample configuration for the code-scan workflow (workflows/code-scan.js). For interactive use (asks for URL + branch conversationally), use the 'code-scan' skill instead — these examples are for the headless/batch invocation.

example_1_single_repo.description: Scan a single repo on its main branch

example_2_multiple_repos.description: Scan several repos in one run — each gets independent stack detection, so a pure-EDS repo never triggers the Java analyzer and vice versa

example_3_trusted_mode.description: Skip the setup/analysis confirmation gates — for CI or batch sweeps where you already trust the target list

example_4_custom_location.description: Override the default clone location (defaults to <ai-agent-repo>/repos)
